log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Vedalken — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Vedalken — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Vedalken — Unarmored Caster HP: 49/67
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 30 damage. Vedalken — Unarmored Caster HP: 19/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 16 damage. Vedalken — Unarmored Caster HP: 3/67
--- Vedalken — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 3/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Vedalken — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.

--- Vedalken — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 32/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
